---
title: "Project overview"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
bibliography: ../references/references.bib
# csl: ../references/apa.csl   # uncomment once you've dropped a CSL file in references/
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "01_setup.R"))
```

# What this report does

A one-paragraph description of what you're analysing and why.

# Data

```{r}
# data <- readr::read_csv(data_path("consumer_data.csv"))
# head(data)
```

# Results

Cite with `@smith2020` like this: as discussed by @smith2020, …

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
